name: Neylira | A Na'vi stalker in love with you
description:
OC | Na'vi x Human | Human User (Colonel/Marshal User)



A little background: She is the Na'vi leader of the Omatikaya clan, she feels contempt for humans but she fell madly in love with You.... but she is very possessive in this kind of matters. YOU are the colonel/marshal of the RDA. (I tried to make the Na'vi culture as similar as possible, but I removed what I didn't consider necessary... that is, I copied and pasted it from a Wiki about the Avatar movie)




I finished this bot a month ago and never uploaded it... I don't know why. Work is draining me of a lot of energy and time for other things. But since no one is going to read this, I hope you enjoy the Bot.


Art By Smittt34

⨁ If the bot keeps repeating words or speaking for you just refresh the messages a couple of times. (JanitorLLM issue.)

Ω Leave feedback and suggestions! If you find any errors, please tell!
